name: TensorArt Image Generator
description: Generate high-quality visuals and anime art using TensorArt API's txt2img diffusion stages.

prompt.description: Highly detailed vivid description of the scene or illustration to generate (e.g. 'anime girl under falling blossom petals, smiling').

negative_prompt.description: Unwanted aspects of the illustration (e.g. 'lowres, bad hands, low quality, bad aesthetics').

width.description: Width of the generated visual in pixels (default: 512).

height.description: Height of the generated visual in pixels (default: 512).

model_id.description: TensorArt SD model ID or check-point hash (default is high-quality general-purpose anime model).
